_doc: recall@k truth set v0 — DRAFT for owner review. Each query → the Fachkarte it SHOULD retrieve. Phrased NATURALLY (German), deliberately often WITHOUT the literal scope-tags, to measure SEMANTIC recall (not keyword). The owner ratifies/corrects the query→card mappings; the recall@k number is provisional until then.
